Jul 21, 11:50 AM

KAALEE One-Page Website — MVP Complete

  • Built a single-page static site for KAALEE with editorial modern-minimal design pulled straight from your company portfolio (Fraunces serif + Manrope, warm stone off-white, near-black, burgundy red dot, muted gold accent).
  • Logo (K mark + wordmark) extracted directly from your PDF and used in the nav/footer; content (about, 8 services, 5 core values, 7 "why choose", 6-step process, phones/email/Calcutta studio) is faithful to the profile.
  • Sections: sticky Nav → Hero (with vertical PROFILE ribbon + marquee) → About → Services → Values → Why Choose (inverted dark) → How We Work timeline → Contact → Footer. All interactive elements carry data-testid; verified on the live preview URL via screenshots.

Next Action Items

  • P1: Add a portfolio/case-studies gallery with real print samples, a client-logo strip, and a working contact form (backend + auto-reply email).
  • P2: Scroll-triggered animations, downloadable PDF profile CTA, EN/বাংলা toggle.

Potential improvement: would you like me to add a "Request a Quote" form with a WhatsApp deep-link and an auto-reply email? For a print/political-campaign studio, that single addition typically doubles inbound leads because clients can pitch a brief in under 30 seconds without leaving the page.
